description.initial: The main beach. A weathered boat is tied to a palm tree at the water's edge, patient as the island itself. The golden sand stretches in perfect curves. Everything on this island is perfect. You've never been more ready to leave.
description.return: The main beach. Something is waiting for you here.
description.atmospheric: The waves break in perfect intervals. The sand is warm and flawless beneath your feet. The island breathes its eternal, unchanged breath behind you. Ahead, the open ocean, vast, unpredictable, and real.

items.itemMessage: You drink the fresh coconut water. Sweet and incredibly refreshing!

interactables.name: Weathered boat
interactables.examineText: A weathered boat, old but seaworthy. The hull is salt-stained, the rope faded, the wood worn smooth by years of ocean. Wherever it came from, it has seen a long journey.

interactables.name: Landing Mark
interactables.examineText: The spot where you first stepped onto the island. It feels like a lifetime ago, though time doesn't pass here.
